title: List of Accredited EFRIS Software Intergrators at at 10 OCT 2025
text:
LIST OF ACCREDITED EFRIS SOFTWARE INTEGRATORS AS AT 10 OCTOBER 2025
Uganda Revenue Authority (URA) has provided a number of options for VAT registered taxpayers to use for mandatory issuance of e-invoices and e-receipts, through the Electronic Fiscal Receipting and Invoicing
Solution (EFRIS). For taxpayers that would like to opt to integrate their billing/ERP systems with EFRIS for issuance of e-invoices and e-receipts, URA has certified the following EFRIS software integrators who
have fulfilled all URA's integration requirements.
